questionHtml:
What is the overall charge, x, of the chromium (III) complex?

[Cr(H2O)4Cl2]x

A.  0

B.  1+

C.  2−

D.  3+

meta.title: What is the overall charge, x, of the chromium (III) complex? [Cr(H2O)4Cl2]x A. 0 B. 1+ C. 2− D. 3+
breadcrumbLabels: Reactivity 3. What are the mechanisms of chemical change?

Reactivity 3.4.8—Coordination bonds are formed when ligands donate an electron pair to transition element cations, forming complex ions. Deduce the charge on a complex ion, given the formula of the ion and ligands present.
